Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Mar-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Conor Granahan, esq. (415-830-3325) for Plaintiff.
Michael B. Moore, esq. (415-969-6501) of Arena Hoffman LLP for Defendant.

The Court noted that Mr. Granahan's papers requested an in-camera hearing. Mr. Moore stated that he does not object to this motion and thought he needed to appear for the hearing. The Court held an in-camera hearing with Mr. Granahan in chambers and ruled as follows:

Attorney Conor Granahan's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF PHILIP NEWTON is Granted. Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
